title: Cal's Pippen back to B1G, commits to Ohio State
content: Cal sophomore guard Justin Pippen, who spent his freshman year at Michigan before heading to Berkley, is transferring to Ohio State, his agents at WME Basketball told ESPN.

title: Sources: Colts seeking to trade away CB Moore
content: The Colts and Kenny Moore II have agreed to seek a trade to find the veteran cornerback a new team, sources told ESPN.

title: Frustrated McIntyre flips off green at Masters
content: Scotland's Robert MacIntyre could face disciplinary action at the Masters after he was caught making a middle finger gesture during a quadruple bogey.

title: Broncos owners acquire minority share of Rockies
content: The Rockies are bringing in Broncos owners Greg Penner and Carrie Walton Penner through a minority investment, with multiple reports saying they are purchasing about 40% of the team.

title: Heat waive Rozier, open roster spot for addition
content: Miami guard Terry Rozier, who has been on leave since October amid a sports gambling probe, has been waived by the Heat.

title: Cubs OF Suzuki set for season debut vs. Pirates
content: Cubs OF Seiya Suzuki has has been activated from the IL after missing the start of the season with a sprained knee and is in the lineup for Friday's series opener against the Pirates.

title: 🏈 NFL draft rankings: Miller's top 482 players
content: Matt Miller has finalized his rankings for the 2026 draft, listing top players and providing grades for each one.

title: Free agency turns 50: Ranking the best -- and worst -- signings in MLB history
content: The first free agent contract ever was signed 50 years ago today. We rate the 8,340 deals of the past half-century.

title: NBA playoff intel: Early buzz on the Lakers, Celtics, Cavs, Pistons Spurs and Warriors
content: Are the Lakers toast? Is the Spurs' 3-point prowess real? We canvass the league on six storylines that could define the postseason.

title: Everything we're hearing this week on the NFL draft: Jets' No. 2 pick plans, bold predictions
content: Where are the Jets leaning on the No. 2 pick? Could Jacob Rodriguez sneak into Round 1? Our NFL draft experts weigh in with their newest intel.

content: Here's how the teams stack up with less than a week to go in 2025-26 -- plus a look ahead to the offseason signing period.

content: The NHL calendar takes a break, so here's an update on all the races between two stacked days on the schedule.

content: Will Lauren Betts, Awa Fam, Azzi Fudd or Olivia Miles go No. 1, and which transfers boosted their draft stock?

content: From best fadeaway to the MVP, Dean Oliver uses ESPN Analytics' Net Points metric to wrap up the season by handing out awards.

content: Surrounded by All-Stars, a 27-year-old in just his second full season is making his mark in the Bronx.

content: Teams with championship hopes fall down our list while unexpected contenders have made surprise starts.

content: The UEFA Champions League is the pinnacle of club soccer, but maybe for Premier League teams, it's just an extra headache?

title: Amid his 20th 30-goal campaign, Alex Ovechkin's future is unclear
content: The Great 8's contract is up after this season, but he sure isn't playing as someone on the edge of retirement.

content: Dive into how women's professional wrestling has evolved on WWE's biggest stage over the past 40 years.

content: Who are the biggest names who might be on the move, and how will the condensed offseason impact free agency?

title: Rankings: Top 100 players for 2026
content: Plan for the 2026 Fantasy Women's Basketball season with the top 100 rankings, including player position ranks.

title: Baldwin best catcher? Alcantara is back? Cam Smith a top-50 bat? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: Awards: Most valuable picks, players and standouts from the 2025-26 season
content: Look back at the breakout players, best draft picks and smartest pickups of the 2026 fantasy hockey season.

title: Comparing the best 2026 recruits to previous classes
content: How good are next year's freshmen? We pit them against the best of 2024 (Sarah Strong) and 2025 (Jazzy Davidson).

title: Why the UFL plans to expand in 2028 and believes Oklahoma City is a great fit
content: UFL co-owner Mike Repole promised expansion; the other city to join with OKC for 2028 is still to be determined.

title: Max Verstappen's inner circle is unravelling -- and so are Red Bull's hopes of keeping him
content: The departure of Max Verstappen's longtime race engineer Gianpiero Lambiase will add fuel to the inferno that is building over the four-time world champion's immediate F1 future, writes ESPN's Nate Saunders.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal look to raise £100m from double exit
content: Myles Lewis-Skelly and Ethan Nwaneri are among five players who could be allowed to leave Arsenal. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Opinion: Opinion: Ahead Of Bengal Polls, Decoding The Bhadralok's Views On SIR
content: In West Bengal, and particularly in Kolkata, the bhadralok have historically played a central role in shaping public opinion.

title: Pawan Khera Gets Pre-Arrest Bail In Case Over Remarks On Himanta Sarma's Wife
content: The case follows a press conference held on 4 April in which Khera alleged that the Assam Chief Minister's wife held passports from three countries.

title: Israeli Airstrikes In Lebanon Kill 20, Threaten Iran And US Peace Talks
content: Mohammad Baqir Ghalibaf, who is expected to head the Iranian delegation in talks with US Vice President JD Vance, has made a ceasefire in Lebanon and release of Iran's blocked assets as a precondition before the start of negotiations

title: Poll Body Transfers Chennai Police Commissioner
content: The EC on Friday ordered the transfer of Greater Chennai Police Commissioner A Arun, replacing him with the 1997 batch IPS officer Abhin Dinesh, on Monday.

title: 7.36 Crore Deletions, 5 Crore Hearing Notices: Phase 2 Of SIR Concludes
content: Uttar Pradesh recorded the highest deletions at 2.89 crore, followed by Tamil Nadu with 97 lakh and West Bengal with 90.8 lakh electors removed.

title: From Uranium To Thorium: India Advances 3-Stage Nuclear Strategy
content: While uranium powers India's nuclear present, thorium remains central to its longterm clean energy future.

title: Why A US-Iran Ceasefire Hasn't Restored Normalcy In Global Shipping
content: While delayed vessels have begun moving through the Gulf once again, the maritime community is far from returning to business as usual.

title: Netanyahu Bars Spain From Key Gaza Panel As Diplomatic Rift Widens
content: Netanyahu accused Madrid of targeting Israel instead of confronting terrorist regimes and said he was not willing to tolerate "hypocrisy".

title: In Bengal, Amit Shah's 'Na Janata, Na Mamata' Jab At Congress
content: Reacting to the oft-repeated Trinamool charge that the Election Commission favours the BJP, Mr Shah said the allegation is a ploy by Ms Banerjee to garner what he called sympathy votes.

title: US Army Describe 'Movie-Like' Kuwait Attack, Call Pentagon Claim "Falsehood"
content: In their first public remarks, soldiers from the army's 103rd Sustainment Command said that the attack was a direct hit on a lightly protected facility, contradicting US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth's comments.

title: Exclusive: Bangladesh Foreign Minister Khalilur Rahman On Shared Future And Bilateral Ties
content: NDTV Exclusive: Bangladesh Foreign Minister Khalilur Rahman described the atmosphere in New Delhi as one of convergence with the two neighbours "willing to engage, talk and take initiatives"

title: Mojtaba Driven By Revenge, Would Assassinate Trump "In A Moment": Ian Bremmer
content: Speaking exclusively to NDTV, the risk analyst pointed out that the Strait of Hormuz is not fully open and only seven vessels passed through it in 24 hours.

title: Assam Sees Record Polling Turnout Driven By Delimitation, Women Voters
content: A key factor behind the surge in turnout is the recent delimitation exercise, which significantly altered constituency boundaries and demographic compositions.

title: Software That Rained Death On Iran: How Palantir's Maven Helped US Military
content: The Iran war is probably the world's first large-scale example of artificial intelligence directing military operations in real time.

title: Israel Pauses Strikes On Beirut After Trump's 'Low-Key' Order To Netanyahu
content: Israel's heaviest strikes on Lebanon since Hezbollah entered the Middle East war in early March killed over 300 people on Wednesday and rattled the uneasy truce between Washington and Tehran less than 48 hours after it came into force.

title: 10-Parachute Landing System Successfully Tested For Gaganyaan Crew Module
content: According to ISRO, the sequence begins with two apex cover separation parachutes, which remove the protective cover of the parachute compartment.

title: Kargil War Hero Sonam Wangchuk Dies, Defence Minister, Army Pay Tributes
content: In a post on X on Friday, Rajnath Singh paid glowing tribute to Col Wangchuk describing him as a highly decorated officer of the Army, renowned for his gallantry, resolute leadership and unwavering commitment to duty.

title: 'We are loading warships with best weapons': Trump hints at big operation if Iran-US talks fail
content: Ahead of crucial Pakistan talks, President Trump warned Iran, stating warships are rearmed and ready for effective use if negotiations fail. Vice President Vance, leading the US delegation, expressed hope for positive talks but cautioned Tehran against testing patience. Iran insists on a Lebanon ceasefire and asset release for formal negotiations.

title: Sites 906 & 931: Inside China's nuclear expansion; mushrooming headache for India
content: China's secret nuclear expansion in Sichuan, revealed by satellite imagery, signals a significant jump in its production capabilities. This build-up, including new high-security complexes, directly impacts India's strategic balance and exposes gaps in global nuclear governance. The developments raise concerns of a renewed arms race as rules appear to be applied unevenly.

title: Nvidia VP: My team, which uses AI very deeply in their work, has a big complaint
content: Nvidia's top AI research executive revealed that even the company's own engineers are facing GPU shortages due to extreme demand. CEO Jensen Huang confirmed that all available hardware is sold out, forcing teams to operate with constrained resources. This scarcity has spurred Nvidia's development of efficient, open-source AI models like Nemotron.

title: IPL: Sooryavanshi blitz scripts history, powers Rajasthan Royals to...
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi powered Rajasthan Royals to a record 97/1 Powerplay while chasing 202 against RCB, smashing 57 off 18 in the first six overs with support from Dhruv Jurel. Earlier, Rajat Patidar scored 63 to lift RCB to 201/8. RR’s aggressive start, after strong bowling led by Ravi Bishnoi, put them firmly in control.

title: Horoscope: Daily astrological predictions for today
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for April 11, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Two years after Google CEO Sundar Pichai’s ‘Code Red’, Satya Nadella orders AI overhaul
content: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has initiated a 'Copilot code red' to enhance AI performance and user experience, aiming to boost investor confidence amidst intense competition.  The company is allocating significant cloud capacity to Copilot development, with analysts suggesting Azure can still exceed expectations due to growing demand and pricing.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' collection: Ranveer's film eyes Rs 1,050 crore
content: Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' continues its impressive box office run, entering its fourth week and surpassing Rs 1050 crore in India. The Ranveer Singh starrer has maintained strong collections despite the IPL, with day 23 earnings pushing its net total to Rs 1,051.06 crore.

title: Laura Loomer reacts as Trump blasts Candace Owens, mocks looks
content: Laura Loomer supported Donald Trump after he criticized Candace Owens and other podcasters in a strong Truth Social post. Loomer mocked Owens while praising Trump. The conflict comes from growing disagreements, as Owens and others have been questioning Trump’s recent decisions on their platforms, leading to a very public and heated exchange online.

title: Iran's new regime more hardline: Israel's big warning ahead of peace talks
content: Israel's IDF warns of a more extreme Iranian leadership under Mojtaba Khamenei, following the death of Ayatollah Khamenei and a joint US-Israeli offensive. Peace talks are set to begin in Islamabad amidst ongoing conflict in Lebanon and the continued closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: $2 tn wipeout to emergency meeting: Anthropic’s AI becomes Wall Street’s biggest headache
content: US Treasury Secretary and Federal Reserve Chair urgently met with top bank CEOs to discuss Anthropic's new AI model, Claude Mythos Preview. This powerful AI can find software vulnerabilities, raising cybersecurity concerns for the financial system. Anthropic launched Project Glasswing to proactively fix flaws before attackers exploit them.

title: Asia C'ships: Ayush downs World No. 4 Christie; India’s first medal secured
content: Indian badminton player Ayush Shetty reached the Asia Championships semi-finals after beating world No. 4 Jonatan Christie, securing India a medal. He became the first Indian since HS Prannoy in 2018 to do so. After earlier upsets, Ayush now eyes the final, while PV Sindhu and Lakshya Sen exited early.

title: Denied permission to play IPL, Thushara apologises to SL after NOC saga
content: Nuwan Thushara has apologised to Sri Lanka Cricket after taking them to court over a denied IPL NOC. He said he didn’t intend to “cause inconvenience” and was “seeking fairness and justice.” With SLC opposing his plea over fitness concerns, Thushara is now considering withdrawing the case, easing tensions while his IPL 2026 participation remains uncertain.

title: Dianna Russini addresses Mike Vrabel affair rumors & Miami comments
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and The New York Times’ popular NFL reporter and insider, Dianna Russini, have sparked outrage among millions after pictures of them sitting together at an upscale hotel were leaked to the media. Both Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have strongly denied any rumors of an affair and continue to maintain they were in a professional setting surrounded by other people. Amid all the mess, Dianna Russini’s old remarks have raised eyebrows.

title: Dianna Russini & Mike Vrabel’s ‘whistle’ video resurfaces amid rumors
content: With the NFL Draft approaching, Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini find themselves dealing with off-field attention after photos sparked speculation. Both denied any inappropriate relationship, calling the interaction innocent. However, past clips and comments have resurfaced, fueling online debate. Their professional history adds context, but not clarity. As reactions continue to grow, the situation highlights how quickly narratives can form in today’s media cycle, even without firm evidence.

title: Megan Thee Stallion on Klay Thompson romance and letting go of her mother
content: The Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, has proven his love and loyalty towards the popular Grammy winner, Megan Thee Stallion, for close to a year of their high profile romance. While Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson seem happy together, the popular artist had gone through a lot in her life, including witnessing her mother’s brutal death in 2019.

title: 'A nightmare for America': Alex Jones reacts after president comments
content: Alex Jones reacted after Donald Trump publicly criticized him and other conservative figures on April 9, 2026. Jones said he felt disappointed and believed Trump had changed. He also pointed to Melania Trump’s comments on the Epstein case, highlighting differences. Despite past support, Jones said he now feels concerned and will continue to speak openly.

title: Failure to launch? Trump's Gaza peace board faces cash crunch, Gaza plan stalls
content: Trump's Board of Peace has received only a fraction of the $17 billion pledged for rebuilding Gaza, preventing plans for the war-hit region's future, This funding crisis has halted plans for a US-backed Palestinian technocratic body to govern Gaza, leaving its deployment stalled due to a lack of available funds and ongoing security concerns.

title: 'BJP can't ally with those wanting Babri in Bengal': Amit Shah on Humayun Kabir
content: ​​​Addressing a press conference after releasing the BJP's manifesto for the Bengal polls, Shah accused Mamata Banerjee's party of "manufacturing political conspiracies". "You do not know Mamata Banerjee's capabilities. She can make 2,000 such videos. Humayun Kabir and the BJP are like the North Pole and the South Pole. We can never be together," Shah was quoted as saying by news agency ANI.

title: Starting with Sachin Tendulkar's decision, Rohit completes 15 years at MI
content: Rohit Sharma completed 15 years with Mumbai Indians, a journey that began with Sachin Tendulkar’s backing in 2011. He went on to lead MI to five IPL titles, becoming their most successful captain. With nearly 6,000 runs and multiple records, Rohit remains central to MI’s legacy and one of IPL’s most iconic player-franchise stories.

title: 'Kantara' mimicry row: Ranveer to file fresh apology affidavit after complainant questions sincerity
content: Ranveer Singh has submitted an apology affidavit to the Karnataka High Court over his mimicry of Rishab Shetty, which allegedly hurt religious sentiments. The actor expressed regret, stating he was unaware of the sensitivities involved. A new, refined affidavit will be filed after consultation with the complainant.

title: 'Don't play us': US VP Vance warns Iran as he heads to Pakistan for talks
content: US Vice President JD Vance issued a stern warning to Iran, "don't play us," as he departed for Pakistan to lead crucial negotiations aimed at ending weeks of Middle East conflict. Vance emphasized that if Iran negotiates in good faith, the US will extend an open hand, but warned against attempts to deceive the negotiating team.

title: 'Could be this year or .... ': Kumble on Sooryavanshi's India chances
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's stellar IPL performances have ignited widespread debate about his imminent India debut. However, spin legend Anil Kumble advises against rushing the 15-year-old, emphasizing that time is on his side. Kumble believes Sooryavanshi is doing all the right things and will remain on selectors' radar, with his debut likely in the coming years.

title: 'Told to stay cool': IT firm sexual exploitation case snowballs, 'suspect' HR gets notice
content: Nashik police have served a notice to an IT company's HR officer, who is a suspect in eight sexual exploitation complaints filed by women employees. The HR officer allegedly failed to act on a complaint of harassment, advising the victim to "stay cool" due to common MNC work culture. Six employees have already been arrested in connection with the case.

title: Mathura tragedy: 10 dead, several missing after tourist boat capsizes in Yamuna; rescue ops on
content: Tragedy struck Mathura's Yamuna River as a boat carrying devotees capsized near Kesi Ghat. At least six lives were lost in the unfortunate incident that occurred Friday afternoon. Around 30 individuals were on two boats when one suddenly sank. Rescue efforts are actively ongoing to locate those still missing, with several already brought to safety.

title: ‘BJP hides behind institutions’: Akhilesh alleges EC misuse in UP bypolls; final SIR list out
content: Samajwadi Party chief Akhilesh Yadav accused the BJP of manipulating the Election Commission during Uttar Pradesh bypolls, alleging the party uses institutions when facing defeat on real issues.  Meanwhile, Uttar Pradesh's final voter list shows an increase of over 84 lakh voters, with the Chief Electoral Officer assuring due process and political party involvement in the revision.

title: Jacksonville Jaguars’ two way star Travis Hunter turns full time cornerback
content: Jacksonville Jaguars’ 2024 rookie sensation Brian Thomas Jr. faced a production dip in 2025. It could be due to two-way star Travis Hunter’s increased offensive role [wide receiver contribution]. Hunter’s shift to full-time cornerback in 2026 will be helpful for Thomas. It will reignite his rookie potential alongside new acquisition Jakobi Myers. This may also put a full stop to his trade rumors.

title: 'Grave consequences': Kharge says Centre's women quota move violates poll code
content: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge voiced concerns over the government's proposed women's reservation law amendments and seat expansion, potentially violating the Model Code of Conduct. He asserted opposition unity and questioned the special Parliament session's timing, alleging political motives. The party emphasized deep deliberation on delimitation and women's empowerment.

title: LSG or GT? Sara Tendulkar's reaction to pap's question goes viral - Watch
content: Sara Tendulkar went viral after smiling and staying silent when asked which team she supports ahead of LSG vs GT. Her reaction may relate to brother Arjun Tendulkar, now with LSG. The young all-rounder, son of Sachin Tendulkar, is yet to get many chances but remains a promising talent this IPL season.

title: Watch: India unleashes Apache's fury; Army's deadliest chopper dominates Brahmastra
content: India's Army unveiled its formidable AH-64E Apache attack helicopters at Exercise Brahmastra, showcasing their advanced combat capabilities. These state-of-the-art machines demonstrated precision strikes and seamless coordination with ground forces, highlighting their role in modern warfare. Deployed in Jodhpur, the Apaches are now a key asset for national security.

title: RR vs RCB: What is the cut-off time for a five-over IPL 2026 match?
content: Rain delayed the toss in the RR vs RCB IPL 2026 match in Guwahati, though a shortened game remains possible with a 10:56 PM cut-off. According to multiple reports, the city saw low buzz due to elections, but fans still turned up for Virat Kohli and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. Both teams, in strong form, are battling for the top spot in this crucial clash.

title: 'We have got to get this kid': How LSG unearthed Mukul Choudhary
content: Mukul Choudhary made a stunning IPL debut with an unbeaten 54 off 27 balls. His powerful hitting secured a thrilling three-wicket victory for Lucknow Super Giants against KKR. Coach Justin Langer praised Choudhary's athleticism and sharp cricketing mind. This close win provides a significant morale boost for the team early in the season.

title: More women in jobs: How pro-active are they in financial and tax planning?
content: Women are actively investing in India, moving beyond traditional savings. While participation in mutual funds and equities is rising, independent control over financial decisions, particularly tax planning, is still developing. Younger women show greater comfort with digital platforms and goal-based investing. This shift signifies a growing financial awareness and engagement across the nation.

title: Mukul Choudhary's untold story: Jail, loans & sacrifice - A father’s 3.5 cr gamble
content: On Friday, Mukul Choudhary became an overnight sensation in the IPL, smashing an unbeaten 27-ball 54, including seven massive sixes, to help Lucknow Super Giants (LSG) pull off a heist against Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) at the iconic Eden Gardens. The 21-year-old was bought by LSG for Rs 2.60 crore.

title: Spy ring busted, 10 held: How Pak was keeping real-time eye on Delhi's critical areas
content: Delhi Police have dismantled a Pakistan ISI-backed spy ring. Ten operatives were arrested for surveilling key locations. They installed cameras to send real-time data to their handlers. This intelligence was intended to plan future terror attacks in India. The operation followed weeks of surveillance. Authorities are analyzing seized devices to find more links.

title: 'BJP to bring UCC in 6 months': Amit Shah pitches common civil law in Bengal
content: UCC is a proposal to have one common set of personal laws for all citizens in India, covering marriage, divorce, inheritance, and adoption, regardless of religion. It aims to ensure equality before law and promote national integration by replacing religion-based personal laws with a uniform legal framework. In the Bengal polls, where BJP strives to wrest power from three-time chief minister Mamata Banerjee, who fiercely opposes the UCC, the issue is expected to highly polarise the elections.

title: Where a government school meets private aspirations
content: Scenes of long queues and high demand mark a remarkable shift as Komatireddy Pratheek Government School in Nalgonda draws overwhelming parental interest. With world-class infrastructure, innovative pedagogy, and strong leadership, it challenges private-school dominance while offering an inclusive, high-quality learning model within the public education system

title: Firmly oppose the targeting of civilians and infrastructure in West Asia conflict, says Jaishankar
content: IOR Ministers in Mauritius, for conference overshadowed this year by the US-Israel war with Iran and peace talks

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Further updates on voter turnout awaited
content: The ECINET app has been displaying 78.27% as the voter turnout since Thursday night. This is ‘provisional’ and does not include service voters and postal ballots

title: Supreme Court steps in after transwoman teacher seeks work
content: As an interim relief, Supreme Court revives a January 2023 direction of a single-judge Bench of the Delhi High Court allowing Jane Kaushik the liberty to apply as a transgender person for any vacancy of her choice, ignoring the gender mentioned for the vacancy.

title: Congress discusses women’s reservation law and delimitation; Kharge to meet other Opposition leaders for joint strategy
content: Kharge to convene INDIA bloc meeting on April 15, a day before the three-day special session to amend women’s reservation law; CWC in favour of immediate quota, but wants wider consultation on delimitation

title: From trial to promotion: Colonel Purohit gets Brigadier clearance
content: As per existing norms, Colonels retire at the age of 54, while Brigadiers retire at 56, making Purohit eligible for extended service if promoted

title: Collector, Police Commissioner inspect 25 accident black spots on National Highway in NTR district
content: NTR District Collector G. Lakshmisha and Police Commissioner S.V. Rajasekhar Babu inspect over 25 accident-prone black spots on the National Highway in NTR district

title: Students left in lurch as Guntur college fails to pay JEE-NEET exams fee
content: College had failed to pay NEET-UG 2026 exam fees for 43 students, says BIE official, adding that coaching campus is running without permission

title: High turnout in Assembly polls historic testimony for India’s democracy: CEC
content: Assam and Puducherry recorded their highest-ever voter turnout of 85.9% and 89.87% respectively, while Kerala recorded one its highest polling percentage at 78.27 %.

title: BJP manifesto promises to double the doles by Trinamool government, implement UCC
content: Fifteen major promises include clearing dearness allowance dues for government employees and pensioners, implementation of Seventh Pay Commission.

title: Admission for I PU to begin from April to help early start of academic activities
content: Artificial Intelligence courses will be introduced to prepare PU students for future technology-based fields

title: Centre slams X’s inaction on Ayyub tweets, threatens to withdraw safe harbour protection
content: Centre says Delhi police sent two statutory notices to X; platform says Centre should direct the “originator” of the tweets to delete them or follow the blocking procedures laid out in Section 69A of the IT Act

title: TN Assembly Elections 2026 | A high-profile fight brews in Chennai’s Mylapore
content: Constituency reflects broader urban churn with residents pointing out civic woes even as national parties look for gains in Tamil Nadu

title: I am enduring pain fighting the party I built brick by brick, says   PMK founder
content: S. Ramadoss says he is not opposing the ‘Mango’ symbol, and contends that it is his symbol and was created by him. Describing the court verdict on the party dispute as ‘different’, he says the  Anbumani faction is making it seem as if the ‘Mango’ symbol and the party did not belong to him

title: Kerala government decides to cancel SSLC, Plus Two exams for Gulf
content: SSLC examinations had been postponed in the Gulf region in the wake of the U.S.-Israel-Iran war in West Asia

title: J&K Deputy CM ‘shocked’ to see suspended official at work; orders probe
content: J&K Deputy Chief Minister Surinder Choudhary, who visited the Directorate of Mining office in Jammu, said officers he had suspended were “still working” and termed the incident “shocking”

title: Major ports clear 90% cargo backlog amid Hormuz disruptions
content: Union Minister of Ports, Shipping and Waterways Sarbananda Sonowal credited timely intervention and continuous monitoring by the Ministry for restoring normalcy in port operations

title: Man killed in Ganderbal encounter a PDP worker, return the body to family: Iltija Mufti
content: Raashid Ahmad Mughal was accused of being an armed terrorist by the Army and was “killed during a search operation launched on March 31-April 1 in Ganderbal’s Arhama forest”

title: Supreme Court terms U.P. child assault, its aftermath ‘appalling’; calls for independent probe
content: Court calls for immediate SC-monitored and time-bound investigation of the case by a Central independent investigating agency or a Special Investigation Team

title: Two India-bound ships among a few transiting Hormuz Strait on Day 2 of ceasefire
content: Ship tracker websites show that Marivex, an oil tanker, is carrying oil from Bandar Abbas in Iran to New Mangalore Port; MSG, another oil tanker, is carrying cargo from UAE to India

title: Jaishankar to visit UAE as India steps up energy diplomacy in the Gulf
content: External Affairs Minister’s weekend visit to UAE follows Petroleum Minister’s visit to Qatar and Commerce Minister’s discussions with Bahrain; India is also helping South Asian neighbours while ensuring its own energy security, says MEA

title: From a DMK campaigner and fan of MGR to renowned littérateur
content: Kalapriya says that before joining the DMK, MGR was associated with the Congress. Over the time, he surrounded himself with seasoned political minds, including communist leaders K.  Baladhandayutham  and  Kalyanasundaram. He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

title: Dairy farmers concerned over lack of attention to their core issues
content: In its manifesto, the DMK has promised the farmers that the procurement price will be increased by ₹5 per litre. But the AIADMK, the NTK, and the TVK have not set out their position on the issue, says M.G. Rajendran

title: Kerala HC quashes government order denying sanction for CBI probe into ₹600 cr. cashew import scam
content: Court summons Principal Secretary of Industries department to appear before it in a contempt plea initiated following denial of sanction for CBI probe into alleged corruption in import of raw cashew between 2006 and 2015 by Kerala Cashew Board

title: TN voter deleted from electoral roll reminds Supreme Court of promise to protect in case of ‘mass exclusion’
content: The petitioner, C. Geetha, said her name had been a mainstay in the State’s electoral roll over the years; she was even intending to contest as an independent candidate in the 51-Uthangarai (SC) Assembly Constituency and 52-Bargur Assembly Constituency in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections in 2026.

title: West Bengal election: Across party lines in Jhargram, poll promises seek to woo adivasi, Dalit voters
content: SCs/STs make up half the population of Jhargram, giving them a decisive say in the poll verdict; TMC, BJP clash over development plans, UCC implementation in a district emerging from the long shadow of Maoist extremism

title: Deeply concerned by mass casualties in Beirut: MEA
content: Respect for sovereignty and territorial integrity of states is essential, says India after the Israeli attack on Lebanon

title: Vande Bharat trains carried 3.98 crore passengers in FY25-26, 36% increase over previous year
content: The Vande Bharat Express has served over 9.1 crore passengers through one lakh trips since its incepetion, says the Ministry of Railways

title: Auqib Nabi: ‘There will be expectations, but I am focusing on my work’
content: Representing Capitals in his maiden IPL, Nabi, who was the toast of the 2025-26 domestic season as J & K won the Ranji for the first time, will test himself in the world’s biggest T20 league after he was roped in by the franchise for ₹8.4 crore; the medium-pacer from Baramulla opens up on the challenge ahead and the domestic season just gone by

title: Justice Yashwant Varma resigns amid parliamentary proceedings to remove him
content: He also withdrew from proceedings before the Judges Inquiry Committee constituted by the Lok Sabha Speaker which was set to look into allegations against him, terming it an ‘unfair’ inquiry

title: Hopeful of a breakthrough at the Islamabad meeting over Iran-U.S. war: Mirwaiz
content: The world was looking towards Islamabad with hope and anticipation, he said, adding that  the people of Kashmir fully comprehend the futility and human cost of war and conflict, having themselves endured decades of grief, loss, and suffering

title: Konthuruthy river restoration: Kochi Corporation hands aid to 80 families
content: The assistance, part of the rehabilitation package, was transferred directly to the bank accounts of beneficiary families who submitted documents in accordance with government norms

title: Anti-war music festival in Thiruvananthapuram on April 12 to feature four metal bands
content: Titled ‘K\ala/pam - Music Concert for Peace,’ the festival is                                                                                                                                                                                                                         organised by the collective ‘Humans of World’

title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: the women's college basketball transfer portal opened Monday with a tidal wave of activity . more than 1,300 players are looking for new homes . the portal closes April 20 but players' decisions for their next school can still come after that .

title: Bayern are special and a force to be reckoned with
content: Frank Leboeuf believes Bayern Munich's "sloppiness" allowed real madrid back into the game . it's difficult to take this stance when snide comments about the supposed weakness of the Bundesliga are made by international pundits who frankly should know a lot better .

title: What the DOJ's NFL investigation could mean for networks, fans
content: the federal government has opened a probe into whether the NFL is harming consumers in the way it sells its broadcast rights . a growing chorus of lawmakers and fans have expressed concern over the NFL and other leagues putting more games on subscription streaming services, leading to potentially increased costs for viewers . the probe is unclear, but the NFL has a limited antitrust exemption as part of the Sports Broadcasting Act of 1961 .

title: Spring game previews: Alabama, Florida among ones to note Saturday
content: nine power 4 schools hold an event on saturday, April 11 . it's spring game season in the world of college football with four games . a quarterback battle at Alabama between Austin Mack and Keelon Russell .

title: 2026 rankings: Profiles for more than 30 tight ends
content: Mike Clay is revealing his fantasy football rookie rankings at each key offensive position . the rankings do not include rookies because we are unsure of their landing spots . he trails only Ja'Marr Chase in targets (317) and receptions (2,385) .

title: Senator contacts leagues over 'gambling's ugly takeover'
content: senator sends letters to six league commissioners raising concerns about "gambling's ugly takeover of sports" he asks the leagues to provide information by may 1 about their partnerships with both sportsbooks and prediction markets . he says the growing prediction market space has "only made the problem wow"

title: Roman Reigns' Top 10 WrestleMania main events: Which match finished No. 1?
content: Roman Reigns will challenge CM Punk at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 on April 18 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas for the world heavyweight championship in his 11th main event . he defeated Brock Lesnar at the "Winner Take All" main event between lesnar and thera .

title: NBA playoff watch: Only two games left for all 30 teams
content: the most critical game of the night is the Western Conference showdown between the LA Clippers and the Portland Trail Blazers . the team that finishes in ninth will need to win two play-in games to set up a first-round meeting with the Oklahoma City Thunder . OKC has already clinched the top seed in the West .

title: Meet the newest source for steals in Chicago
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . among the 10 teams scheduled to play on all seven days, eight hail from the American League . the new york Mets visit the los Angeles Dodgers on ESPN beginning at 10 p.m. ET .

title: Source: Gray nearing 3-year max deal with Dream
content: allisha Gray is finalizing a three-year max-plus deal with the Atlanta Dream . she was also a top-four MVP candidate and led the dream to a franchise-best 30-win season . her shooting percentage from the field (45.1%) and from 3 (38.4%) ranked in the top three percentages of her career .

title: Sources: Ogunbowale multiyear deal with Wings
content: four-time WNBA All-Star arike Ogunbowale is signing a seven-figure, multi-year deal with the Dallas Wings . she was extended a core qualifying offer earlier this week, making her eligible for the $1.4 million supermax in 2026 . sources said she is taking less than that for the team to build a quality roster around her .

title: Best shots, moments and more from the second round
content: the 90th edition of the Masters continues on Friday . Xander Schauffele is a little farther down the leaderboard . #themasters pic.twitter.com/hyraLs6Gwd Scottie Scheffler birdies Camellia .

title: Ranking the top 50 men's basketball players to enter transfer portal
content: more than 1,000 men's basketball players have added their names to the transfer portal . most coaches expect this season's portal entrants to surpass the 3,000 mark . the NCAA enacted rule changes earlier this year that changed the window in all sports .

title: Ad-Vance party on thin ice: US Veep, tasked with salvaging war goals, heads to diplomatic frontlines in Pakistan
content: a number of analysts characterising the war on Iran as militarily and tactically brilliant but strategically and diplomatically dumb . the vice president is tasked with salvaging US gains from a war it has won while losing the peace as Tehran has dug in its heels despite being militarily pulverised .
